briefdescription.para: Radius at other end.
Utility value: dr/dx.
coords
Radius at one end.
Utility value: Total length of cylinder.
Length constant for diffusion. Equal to dx.

detaileddescription.para: surfaceGranularity_ decides how finely to subdivide DiffLength or cubic mesh side, when computing surface area of intersections between them when diffusing. Defaults to 0.1

briefdescription.para: coords
coords
coords
coords
coords
Volume of mesh Entry including abutting diff-coupled voxels.

detaileddescription.para: Virtual function to return volume of mesh Entry, including for diffusively coupled voxels from other solvers.

briefdescription.para: Virtual function to return coords of mesh Entry.

detaileddescription.para: Virtual function to return coords of mesh Entry. For Cylindrical mesh, coords are x1y1z1 x2y2z2 r0 r1 phi0 phi1

briefdescription.para: x0,y0,z0, x1,y1,z1, dia0, dia1. Note use of diamter, not radius.
Virtual function to return diffusion X-section area.

detaileddescription.para: Virtual function to return diffusion X-section area for each neighbor.

briefdescription.para: Virtual function to return scale factor for diffusion. 1 here.
Virtual function to return dimensions of specified entry.
Virtual function to return volume of mesh Entry.

detaileddescription.para: diffLength = length constant for diffusive spread len = length of each mesh entry totLen = total length of cylinder diffLength = k * r^2 Each entry has the same number of diffLengths, L = len/diffLength. Thinner entries have shorter diffLength. This gives a moderately nasty quadratic. However, as len(i) is prop to diffLength(i), and diffLength(i) is prop to r(i)^2 and the cyl-mesh is assumed a gently sloping cone we get len(i) is prop to (r0 + slope.x)^2 and ignoring the 2nd-order term we have len(i) is approx proportional to x position.

dr/dx = (r1-r0)/len ri = r0 + i * dr/dx r(i+1)-ri = (r1-r0)/numEntries len = k * r^2 we get k from integ_r0,r1( len.dr ) = totLen So k.r^3/3 | r0, r1 = totLen => k/3 * ( r1^3 - r0^3) = totLen => k = 3 * totLen / (r1^3 - r0^3); This is bad if r1 == r0, and is generally unpleasant.

Simple definition of rSlope: rSlope is measured per meshEntry, not per length: rSlope = ( r1 - r0 ) / numEntries; Let's just compute len0 from r0 and diffLength. len0/diffLength = 2 * r0 / (r0 + r1) so len0 = diffLength * 2 * r0 / (r0 + r1) and dlen/dx = lenSlope = diffLength * rSlope * 2/(r0 + r1)

Drop the following calculations: // dlen/dx = dr/dx * dlen/dr = ( (r1-r0)/len ) * 2k.r // To linearize, let 2r = r0 + r1. // so dlen/dx = ( (r1-r0)/len ) * k * ( r0 + r1 ) // len(i) = len0 + i * dlen/dx // len0 = totLen/numEntries - ( numEntries/2 ) * dlen/dx

briefdescription.para: Virtual function to return MeshType of specified entry.
Inherited virtual, do nothing for now.

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int index, double &x, double &y, double &z) const
memberdef.name: indexToSpace

detaileddescription.para: Converts specified index to xyz coords of middle of voxel Values out of range return original xyz

memberdef.argsstring: (const Eref &e, double volume, unsigned int numEntries)
memberdef.name: innerBuildDefaultMesh

briefdescription.para: Virtual func to make a mesh with specified Volume and numEntries.

inbodydescription.para: Single voxel cylinder with diameter = length. vol = volume = pi.r^2.len. So len = 2r, volume = pi*r^2*2r = 2pi*r^3 so r = (volume/2pi)^(1/3)

detaileddescription.para: Inherited virtual func. Returns number of MeshEntry in array

memberdef.argsstring: (const Eref &e, unsigned int numNodes, unsigned int numThreads)
memberdef.name: innerHandleNodeInfo

memberdef.argsstring: (const Eref &e, const SrcFinfo2< unsigned int, std::vector< double > > *meshStatsFinfo)
memberdef.name: innerHandleRequestMeshStats

param.type: const SrcFinfo2< unsigned int, std::vector< double > > *

briefdescription.para: More inherited virtual funcs: request comes in for mesh stats.
Inherited virtual func.

detaileddescription.para: Inherited virtual func. Assigns number of MeshEntries.

memberdef.argsstring: (double x, double y, double z, double &linePos, double &r) const
memberdef.name: nearest

memberdef.argsstring: (double x, double y, double z, unsigned int &index) const
memberdef.name: nearest

detaileddescription.para: Returns distance and index of nearest mesh entry. Computes each mesh entry position as its geometric centre. If the current location is not inside a valid mesh entry, distance returned is negative.
Recomputes all local coordinate and meshing data following a change in any of the coord parameters
This assumes that diffLength is the quantity to preserve, over numEntries. So when the compartment changes volume, numEntries changes. diffLength will be fine-tuned to be a clean multiple.

briefdescription.para: Inherited virtual. Returns entire volume of compartment.
Virtual func so that derived classes can return voxel midpoint.
Virtual func so that derived classes can pass voxel volume back.
Inherited virtual. Resizes len and dia of each voxel.

detaileddescription.para: The CylMesh represents a chemically identified compartment shaped like an extended cylinder. This is psuedo-1 dimension: Only the axial dimension is considered for diffusion and subdivisions. Typically used in modelling small segments of dendrite
